title: Altivar Machine ATV340 Wiring Diagrams (NVE97896)
why_selected: Schneider ATV340 VFD: mains input (S1/S2/S3 variants), motor output, STO_A/STO_B safety, DI1-DI5, AI1-AI3/AQ1 analog, R1/R2 relays, DQ1/DQ2, encoder, Modbus/Sercos — a dense IEC drive to cross-check against the NEMA GS20. Page 0 verified by render 2026-07-13 as the wiring sheet (1/2). Caption chosen to satisfy the production is_print_question() gate (an initial 'Explain the power and control wiring…' phrasing is gate-rejected). Publicly published instruction sheet on download.schneider-electric.com; provenance verified 2026-07-10.
license_note: Publicly published OEM literature; ownership retained by Schneider Electric; retained only for read-only interpreter testing.
